index.title: Check for Stroke Signs
index.subtitle: Face · Arm · Speech
index.emergency: Suspect stroke? Don’t wait for the result. Contact local emergency services now.
index.notDiagnosis: Preliminary screening only · Not a diagnosis
index.invalid: Unable to assess · Tap to retry
index.newPersonBody: Current results will be cleared and a new screening session started.

disclaimer.title: Before you begin
disclaimer.body: QuickStroke is for preliminary screening only. It is not a medical diagnosis, and a result with no abnormal sign detected does not rule out stroke.
disclaimer.emergency: If you suspect stroke, do not wait for the result. Contact local emergency services immediately.

face.mouthNotAssessable: ⚠️ Mouth not clear · Keep it visible and smile widely
face.invalidHelp: ⚠️ Unable to assess after several tries · Ask for help or tap ↺
face.critical:
🚨 Marked facial asymmetry detected
If stroke is suspected, call emergency services now
face.cameraErr: ⚠️ Cannot access the camera. Please allow camera access.
face.modelErr: ❌ Failed to load face detection. Check your connection and try again.

arm.sensorDenied: Motion access denied. Please allow in Settings and refresh.
arm.sensorUnsupported: Motion sensor not supported on this device.
arm.subMeasure: Keep your arm and wrist straight
arm.warnFlatSub: Keep the top of the phone pointing up
arm.finalOkSub: No significant phone-angle change consistent with arm drift was detected.
arm.finalBadSub: The movement pattern may be consistent with arm drift. Seek urgent medical assessment if stroke is suspected.
arm.vWait_right: Extend your right arm. Screen faces left. Hold still.
arm.vWait_left: Now extend your left arm. Screen faces right. Hold still.
arm.vCalibRetry: Hold as still as you can.
arm.vFlat: Hold the phone upright with the top facing up.
arm.subRetryWrist: Keep your wrist straight and try again
arm.subRetryUncertain: Keep your wrist straight and try again
arm.vRetryWrist: Your wrist moved. Please repeat this arm with the wrist straight.
arm.vRetryUncertain: The movement was unclear. Please repeat this arm.
arm.vFinalBad: Drift detected. Please see a doctor soon.
arm.guideNote: Arm straight · elbow straight · keep still

generic.title: Adjust the phone position
generic.subtitle: Hold still and try again
generic.voice: Adjust the phone position, hold still, and try again.

permission_denied.title: Allow motion access
permission_denied.subtitle: It is required for the arm test
permission_denied.voice: Please allow motion access. It is required for the arm test.

permission_error.title: Could not start the sensors
permission_error.subtitle: Try again
permission_error.voice: The sensors could not be started. Please try again.

sensor_unsupported.title: Motion sensors are unavailable
sensor_unsupported.subtitle: Use another device or browser
sensor_unsupported.voice: Motion sensors are unavailable. Please use another device or browser.

sensor_no_samples.title: No motion data yet
sensor_no_samples.subtitle: Hold the phone and try again
sensor_no_samples.voice: No motion data is available yet. Hold the phone and try again.

sensor_stale.title: Motion data was interrupted
sensor_stale.subtitle: Return to this page and try again
sensor_stale.voice: Motion data was interrupted. Return to this page and try again.

device_landscape.title: Hold the phone upright
device_landscape.subtitle: Keep the top of the phone upward
device_landscape.voice: Hold the phone upright, with the top of the phone pointing upward.

device_flat.title: Hold the phone more upright
device_flat.subtitle: Do not hold the screen flat
device_flat.voice: Hold the phone more upright. Do not hold the screen flat.

device_not_upright.title: Hold the phone upright
device_not_upright.subtitle: Match the position shown
device_not_upright.voice: Hold the phone upright and match the position shown.

device_upside_down.title: Turn the phone around
device_upside_down.subtitle: Keep the top of the phone upward
device_upside_down.voice: Turn the phone around, with the top pointing upward.

device_not_moved_from_rest.title: The phone has not been raised
device_not_moved_from_rest.subtitle: Raise it as shown, then hold still
device_not_moved_from_rest.voice: Raise the phone as shown, then hold still.

coordinate_frame_unresolved.title: Screen direction is unavailable
coordinate_frame_unresolved.subtitle: Lock portrait mode and try again
coordinate_frame_unresolved.voice: Screen direction is unavailable. Lock portrait mode and try again.

pose_changed_before_measurement.title: Your position changed
pose_changed_before_measurement.subtitle: Hold still until the start sound
pose_changed_before_measurement.voice: Your position changed. Reposition and hold still until the start sound.

screen_orientation_changed.title: Do not rotate the screen
screen_orientation_changed.subtitle: Return to portrait and try again
screen_orientation_changed.voice: Do not rotate the screen during the test. Return to portrait and try again.

sensor_source_changed.title: Sensor input changed
sensor_source_changed.subtitle: Hold still while a new baseline is taken
sensor_source_changed.voice: Sensor input changed. Hold still while a new baseline is taken.

page_hidden.title: The test was paused
page_hidden.subtitle: Return to this page and try again
page_hidden.voice: The test was paused. Return to this page and try again.

orientation_unstable.title: Hold still
orientation_unstable.subtitle: The test will start automatically
orientation_unstable.voice: Hold still. The test will start automatically.

speech.hint: Wait for the signal, then say this sentence
speech.noiseDesc: Background noise may affect the result
speech.noisyTag: ⚠ SNR below 10 dB; background noise may affect the result
speech.subBad: Abnormal speech sign detected · Contact emergency services if stroke is suspected
speech.voiceButNoText: Voice detected, but not recognized in the selected language
speech.deadMicFailed: ⚠️ Microphone is not responding. Please wait a moment and start again.
speech.subInvalid: The speech check could not be completed. Please try again.
speech.retryingNoVoice: No voice was detected. Retrying once…
speech.retryingNoText: Speech was detected, but the words were not recognized. Retrying once…
speech.micSessionReset: Resetting the microphone for a new attempt…

result.individualReviewDesc: This check found a sign that needs review
result.individualNotCombined: This is one check, not the combined 3-sign result
result.stateOkDesc: This result does not rule out stroke
result.nextNoData: Begin with Face, then complete all checks
result.nextOk: Still have symptoms or suspect stroke? Do not wait
result.nextReview: If symptoms began suddenly, contact emergency services
result.nextUrgent: Note the symptom start time and do not drive yourself
result.safetyNote: Preliminary screening only · Not a diagnosis
result.retryConfirm: Clear all results and start over?
result.emergencyReminderThailand: Still suspect stroke? Do not wait
result.emergencyReminderLocal: Still suspect stroke? Contact local emergency services
result.technicalDisclaimer: Internal scores are for system analysis only. They are not a risk percentage or diagnosis.

permissions.needCamera: This step needs your camera to check facial symmetry.
permissions.needMic: This step needs your microphone to check speech.
permissions.privacyNote: QuickStroke processes camera and microphone data on this device only.
permissions.blockedCamera: Camera access is blocked. Please enable camera permission.
permissions.blockedMic: Microphone access is blocked. Please enable microphone permission.
permissions.notFoundCamera: No camera found on this device.
permissions.notFoundMic: No microphone found on this device.
permissions.inUse: The device is being used by another app. Close it and try again.
permissions.insecure: This page must be opened over HTTPS.
iosSafari: Tap the “aA” icon in the address bar.
Enable Camera or Microphone, then reload the page.
androidChrome: Tap the site controls icon next to the web address.
Enable Camera or Microphone, then reload the page.
desktop: Click the site controls icon next to the web address.
permissions.loadError: Unable to load language resources. Please reload the page.
permissions.privacyCameraNote: Camera frames are processed on this device and are not uploaded by QuickStroke.
permissions.privacyMicNote: QuickStroke does not store raw audio. Speech recognition is provided by the browser or operating system and may use an external service.
